name: Turok (2008)
post_apply_message:
Turok (2008, delisted) — Apply adds the Steam shortcut on GE-Proton 10.34.

THE RIGHT EXE: the shortcut points at Binaries/TurokGame.exe with the working dir set to Binaries — NOT 'Play Turok.exe' at the root. The crack's own readme (ChemicalFlood) says as much: "The Game's Real .EXE is called TurokGame.exe and is inside the Binaries folder, just in case you're not on Windows (Steamdeck!)".

WIDESCREEN + FOV — already handled, via the d-input ASI loader: your copy bundles Turok2008FOVFix.asi (a widescreen/FOV fix) plus a dinput8.dll that is an Ultimate ASI Loader. Wine has to load THAT local dinput8.dll for the fix to inject, so the shortcut carries WINEDLLOVERRIDES="dinput8=n,b". The fix auto-detects the display resolution (its ini has Width=0/Height=0) and corrects the FOV to match — so on the Deck's panel it just works, nothing to set. If the game looks zoomed/4:3, that means the ASI didn't load: PROTON_LOG=1 is already on the shortcut, so launch, quit, run 🔍 Scan, and I'll read ~/steam-<appid>.log for 'dinput8'/'Turok2008FOVFix' to confirm.

DO NOT answer 'Yes' to the question at first launch (it can break the game's PostFX). If you already did, the crack ships a '_Fix PostFX.bat' that restores the config from its medi/ backup folder — run it on Windows against the game folder.

CONTROLLER: native XInput support (xinput1_3.dll is bundled) — Steam Input's default gamepad layout works.
notes: Built 2026-07-21 from Tony's copy at NAS _games/Turok (ChemicalFlood crack, delisted 2008 reboot — abandonware lane). UE3 engine. Launch = Binaries/TurokGame.exe, working dir Binaries (RunMe.bat does exactly this: pushd Binaries, run turokgame.exe). FOV/widescreen fix is Turok2008FOVFix.asi loaded by Binaries/dinput8.dll (Ultimate ASI Loader) — the .log confirms it loads into TurokGame.exe and auto-detects desktop resolution for the FOV calc (Width/Height=0 in its ini). Hence WINEDLLOVERRIDES="dinput8=n,b" so Wine uses the local loader. The fix ships INSIDE the game folder (deploys with the game) so no payload/copy_files is needed. PROTON_LOG=1 added because the fix depends on the ASI loader loading — same 'did the wrapper load' question as MoH:PA / TC-NYC. _Fix PostFX.bat is a recovery script for a first-launch prompt gotcha (documented, not applied). Native XInput. Non-Steam -> computed appid. UNTESTED on hardware.
